ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "lvar" REAL /* Loudness variation */,
  "lave" REAL /* Average loudness level */,
  "lmax" INTEGER /* Maximum loudness level */,
  "lfe" REAL /* Energy level of the song */,
  "lfreq" REAL /* Frequency of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_songs" (
  "album_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album song mapping */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song included in the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, content_manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song mapping */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song included in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being analyzed */,
  "plays" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes received for the song */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the song */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "song_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., mood, tempo, instrumentation) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
